final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: commercial e-commerce poster, bold graphic design with tech-forward aesthetic, clean modern typography
Composition: centered layout with strong visual hierarchy, headline prominent at top, product/brand element as focal point, CTA area at bottom
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud product imagery or abstract cloud/storage iconography, celebrating 618 anniversary milestone
Scene/backdrop: minimal studio backdrop or gradient background, uncluttered to emphasize product and promotional message
Lighting/mood: bright even studio lighting, energetic and celebratory atmosphere suitable for sales event
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as anchor, vibrant accent colors for 618 celebration theme, high contrast for readability
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云" "618" "周年庆"
Constraints: must work as square social media post and vertical e-commerce banner; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: generic stock photo aesthetic; cluttered compositions; low contrast text; watermark overlays; excessive decorative elements that distract from CTA
